title: Why Russell’s Austrian GP pole lap was legal
summary: When Max Verstappen lost control at Turn 9 on his final lap of Q3 at the Austrian Grand Prix, it seemed to lock in a Ferrari front row lock-out. But one key detail meant there were at least two cars that still had a chance to improve their lap time. And George Russell took that opportunity.
